movie.actors: Tom Hanks, Meg Ryan, Greg Kinnear, Parker Posey
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Golden Globe. Another 5 wins & 7 nominations.
movie.plot: Two business rivals who despise each other in real life unwittingly fall in love over the Internet.
movie.title: You've Got Mail
movie.writer: Miklós László (play), Nora Ephron (screenplay), Delia Ephron (screenplay)
